description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a vibrant green camouflage pattern with white and gray accents. The shoe has a white perforated toe box, white laces, and a prominent neon green Nike Swoosh on both sides. The lateral side displays bold white text reading 'MICHIGAN' and 'GO GREEN', suggesting a custom or themed design. The collar and heel area are reinforced with gray overlays, while the midsole is white and the outsole is also white, providing a clean contrast to the colorful upper. The shoe appears to be constructed from synthetic leather, mesh, and rubber, with visible stitching and paneling for durability and style.
description: A high-top sneaker with green camouflage, neon green Nike Swoosh, white laces, and bold 'MICHIGAN' and 'GO GREEN' text, featuring gray and white accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white perforated toe box, white laces, and the green camouflage pattern around the toe and sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the neon green Nike Swoosh, 'MICHIGAN' and 'GO GREEN' text, and the layered green camo and gray overlays.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the gray heel collar, green camo wrapping around the back, and the white midsole and outsole.
description_view_3: Right side view with a clear look at the neon green Swoosh, green camo pattern, and the absence of text compared to the left side.
attribute_logo: Neon green Nike Swoosh on both sides of the shoe
